Book Your Stay
Dining

A table with a view to remember

Our restaurant is the heart of Hotel Kleopatra — a place where the day's freshest ingredients become simple, beautiful meals. Traditional Montenegrin recipes meet the flavours of the wider Mediterranean, served on a terrace where the sea stretches endlessly before you.

Breakfast Buffet

Sunrise spreads of fresh pastries, local fruit and strong coffee.

Mediterranean Cuisine

Grilled catch, olive oil and herbs straight from the coast.

Local & Seasonal

Produce from Montenegrin farms and the morning markets.

Al Fresco Evenings

Dine beneath string lights as the sky turns gold.

Reserve a Table
From our kitchen

Flavours of the Adriatic coast

Our menu changes with the seasons, but these perennial favourites keep our guests coming back.

🐟
Fresh Grilled Fish

Daily catch from Ulcinj fishermen, grilled with olive oil and herbs.

🥩
Njeguški Steak

Traditional Montenegrin air-dried ham served with local cheese and olives.

🦪
Buzara Mussels

Mussels simmered in white wine, garlic and fresh parsley.

🍝
Homemade Pasta

Hand-rolled pasta with seasonal sauce — a taste of the family kitchen.

🥗
Fresh Garden Salad

Tomatoes, cucumbers and peppers from the local market.

🍯
Baklava & Coffee

Crispy filo pastry with walnuts and honey — the perfect finish.

Breakfast
07:30 – 10:00

Buffet with fresh pastries, eggs, fruit and local charcuterie.

Lunch
12:00 – 15:00

Light meals, salads and grilled specialities.

Dinner
18:00 – 22:00

Full menu of Montenegrin and Mediterranean classics.

Please let us know about any dietary requirements before your arrival — we are happy to accommodate vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free preferences.

Letters from the coast

Seasonal offers, quiet-season escapes and stories from Ulcinj — a few times a year, never more.

Hotel Kleopatra
Ulcinj · Montenegro

A family-run hotel above the Adriatic, where every guest arrives as a stranger and leaves as a friend.
